Title: Exempts certain property in the village of Lake Placid from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a church
Summary: Exempts certain property in the village of Lake Placid, town of North Elba, from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a church.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the alcoholic beverage control law, in relation to an exemption for certain property in the village of Lake Placid from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a church
